chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1374 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.5804/2023 3. For hearing of main case 17-10-2023 Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned APG has pointed out that this petition has been filed for quashment of FIR No.141/2023, registered at Police Station Dadhyal, District Chakwal, Province of Punjab and does not fall within territorial jurisdiction of this court. This legal position has not been disputed by learned counsel for the petitioners and seeks disposal of this petition with the prayer that petitioners may be provided protection in accordance with law. Order accordingly. This petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
